hero.title: Detective Conan Filter
hero.description: This filter turns your photos and videos into scenes inspired by the Detective Conan anime, complete with a hand‑drawn comic style and a tense, mystery‑driven atmosphere. It works perfectly for social media clips, cosplay reveals, mystery‑themed Reels, Shorts, and creative ads that need a distinctive, eye‑catching look.
hero.upload_instruction: Upload media to apply this template.
hero.image_prompt_before: A clean, natural daylight portrait of a young adult with neutral expression, standing in a quiet city alleyway. Realistic photography, sharp focus, soft sunlight, no filters or edits.
hero.image_prompt_after: The same alleyway scene transformed by the Detective Conan Filter effect: hand‑drawn anime‑style lines overlay the image, sepia & noir tones dominate, the person now has large expressive eyes and a Conan‑esque jacket, subtle speed lines and shadowed edges create a suspenseful manga atmosphere.

what_it_is.title: What makes a Detective Conan Filter video work?
what_it_is.intro: This filter turns your photo into a Detective Conan-style anime portrait, blending cel-shaded rendering, bold line art, and a suspenseful noir atmosphere. Signature elements like sharp suits, glasses, and a shadowy background capture the detective anime vibe, making your image feel like a scene from the series.

cards.title: Clear front-facing portrait
cards.description: A front-facing photo with even lighting and visible facial features helps the filter map the anime style accurately, preserving your likeness.

cards.title: Detective pose and expression
cards.description: Look slightly away from the camera with a thoughtful expression. The filter enhances your features with a sharp suit, glasses, and a dramatic shadowed backdrop.

cards.title: Anime-style sketch reveal
cards.description: The effect overlays a sketchy line-art animation that transitions into a fully colored anime portrait, creating a comic-book suspense feel.

cards.title: Nostalgic anime hook
cards.description: The iconic anime aesthetic and suspenseful mood trigger curiosity and nostalgia, making viewers stop scrolling and share, perfect for Reels and TikTok trends.

application_scenarios.title: Application Scenarios
application_scenarios.description: Real examples of the Detective Conan Filter in action across popular social platforms and content niches.

scenarios.title: Anime Fan Profile Pics
scenarios.description: Transform your selfie into a Detective Conan character for a standout anime-style profile picture.
scenarios.image_prompt: A young person holding a smartphone taking a selfie, the screen shows their face transformed with the Detective Conan Filter: anime-style detective with round glasses, red bowtie, and a blue suit, against a foggy city street background, anime art style.

scenarios.title: Mystery Storytelling Videos
scenarios.description: Add a detective persona to your mystery narration or true crime commentary with the anime filter.
scenarios.image_prompt: A content creator filming a video in a dimly lit room, their face transformed by the Detective Conan Filter, looking like a sharp anime detective, with a magnifying glass in hand and a mysterious backdrop of bookshelves, cinematic lighting.

scenarios.title: Cosplay Try-On Preview
scenarios.description: Showcase a digital cosplay of Detective Conan without the full costume, perfect for cosplay teasers.
scenarios.image_prompt: Split screen of a person's photo: left side normal, right side with the Detective Conan Filter applied, turning them into an anime detective with the iconic glasses, bowtie, and spiky hair, with a detective hat, against a plain background to highlight the transformation.

faqs.question: What is the Detective Conan Filter effect?
faqs.answer: The Detective Conan Filter transforms your photo into an anime-style portrait inspired by the character Conan Edogawa. It adds a suspenseful, mystery-themed look with signature glasses, bow tie, and a sharp detective vibe.

faqs.question: Why is the Detective Conan Filter useful for TikTok, Reels, or Shorts?
faqs.answer: It creates eye-catching mystery content that stands out in feeds. The recognizable anime style helps boost engagement on short-form video platforms by tapping into nostalgia and trending anime aesthetics.

faqs.question: Can I create Detective Conan Filter from one uploaded image?
faqs.answer: Yes. Upload a single photo, and the filter automatically applies the anime detective effect. No multiple images or manual editing are needed.

faqs.question: What kind of image or video works best?
faqs.answer: Use a clear, well-lit frontal portrait with a simple background. Avoid heavy shadows or obstructions for the filter to accurately map facial features and deliver a clean result.

faqs.question: Can I use it for product, fashion, travel, or creator content?
faqs.answer: It is especially suited for creator and storytelling content. You can use it to add a mystery twist to personal videos, cosplay shoots, or themed social media posts, but it is less optimal for standard product or fashion showcases.

cta.headline: Turn Your Photos Into Detective Conan Art
cta.supporting_text: Start with a prompt, upload a photo, or use a template to apply the effect instantly.

other_names.title: Other names for Detective Conan Filter
other_names.description: You might know this effect under different names—people often search for terms like Case Closed filter, Conan anime style, or manga detective portrait. Whatever you call it, LazyKiwi helps you turn those ideas into short-video-ready visuals, bringing the iconic look of the beloved series to life in seconds.
